choices.text: Spacecraft enters safe mode (low power, ground contact, stable attitude). Telemetry analyzed; reproduce in simulator; plan recovery. Famous: Galileo HGA stuck (worked with LGA); Hubble mirror (corrective optics); Voyager AC fixed from 24B km.

Mid-course corrections (MCCs): small thruster burns at planned intervals. Mars probes typically 4-6 MCCs en route. Voyager many MCCs over decades. Trajectory never perfect; navigation refinement standard.
